engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table purchase ( id bigint not null, code varchar(255) not null, date datetime(6) not null, total_price float(23) not null, review_id bigint, route_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table purchase_seq ( next_val bigint ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: insert into purchase_seq values ( 1 ) Hibernate: create table review ( id bigint not null auto_increment, comment varchar(255), rating integer not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table route ( id bigint not null, max_number_users integer not null, name varchar(255) not null, price float(23) not null, total_km float(23) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table route_driver ( route_id bigint not null, driver_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table route_guide ( route_id bigint not null, guide_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table route_seq ( next_val bigint ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: insert into route_seq values ( 1 ) Hibernate: create table route_stops ( route_id bigint not null, stop_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table service ( id bigint not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(100) not null, price float(23) not null, supplier_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table service_seq ( next_val bigint ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: insert into service_seq values ( 1 ) Hibernate: create table stop ( id bigint not null, description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, p1_0.review_id, p1_0.route_id, p1_0.total_price, p1_0.user_id from purchase p1_0 join user u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id and (u1_0.active = 1) where u1_0.username=? limit ?, ? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.comment, p1_0.id, p1_0.code, p1_0.date, p1_0.route_id, r2_0.id, r2_0.max_number_users, r2_0.name, r2_0.price, r2_0.total_km, p1_0.total_price, p1_0.user_id, u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone_number, u1_0.username, u1_0.expedient, u1_0.education, r1_0.rating from review r1_0 left join purchase p1_0 on r1_0.id=p1_0.review_id left join route r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.route_id left join user u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id and (u1_0.active = 1) where r1_0.id=? testcase.name: getRoutesWithStopTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from stop s1_0 where s1_0.name like ? escape '\\' limit ?, ? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from stop s1_0 where s1_0.name like ? escape '\\' limit ?, ? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from stop s1_0 where s1_0.name like ? escape '\\' limit ?, ? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.max_number_users, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.total_km from route r1_0 left join route_stops s1_0 on r1_0.id=s1_0.route_id where s1_0.stop_id=? limit ?, ? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.max_number_users, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.total_km from route r1_0 left join route_stops s1_0 on r1_0.id=s1_0.route_id where s1_0.stop_id=? limit ?, ? Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.max_number_users, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.total_km from route r1_0 left join route_stops s1_0 on r1_0.id=s1_0.route_id where s1_0.stop_id=? limit ?, ?

testcase.name: getMaxStopOfRoutesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select max((select count(1) from route_stops s1_0 where r1_0.id=s1_0.route_id)) from route r1_0

testcase.name: getTopNSuppliersInPurchasesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s2_0.id, s2_0.authorization_number, s2_0.business_name from service s1_0 join item_service isl1_0 on s1_0.id=isl1_0.service_id join supplier s2_0 on s2_0.id=s1_0.supplier_id group by s2_0.id order by count(isl1_0.purchase_id) desc limit ?, ? Hibernate: select s2_0.id, s2_0.authorization_number, s2_0.business_name from service s1_0 join item_service isl1_0 on s1_0.id=isl1_0.service_id join supplier s2_0 on s2_0.id=s1_0.supplier_id group by s2_0.id order by count(isl1_0.purchase_id) desc limit ?, ?

testcase.name: getRoutesNotSellTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.max_number_users, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.total_km from route r1_0 where not exists(select p1_0.id from purchase p1_0 where p1_0.route_id=r1_0.id) limit ?, ?

testcase.name: getUserSpendingMoreThanTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone_number, u1_0.username, u1_0.expedient, u1_0.education from purchase p1_0 join user u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id and (u1_0.active = 1) where p1_0.total_price>=? limit ?, ? Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone_number, u1_0.username, u1_0.expedient, u1_0.education from purchase p1_0 join user u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id and (u1_0.active = 1) where p1_0.total_price>=? limit ?, ? Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.active, u1_0.birthdate, u1_0.email, u1_0.name, u1_0.password, u1_0.phone_number, u1_0.username, u1_0.expedient, u1_0.education from purchase p1_0 join user u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id and (u1_0.active = 1) where p1_0.total_price>=? limit ?, ?

testcase.name: getMostDemandedServiceTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.description, s1_0.name, s1_0.price, s1_0.supplier_id from item_service is1_0 join service s1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id group by s1_0.id order by sum(is1_0.quantity) desc limit 1 Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.authorization_number, s1_0.business_name from supplier s1_0 where s1_0.id=?

testcase.name: getTourGuidesWithRating1Test
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select distinct tgl1_1.id, tgl1_1.active, tgl1_1.birthdate, tgl1_1.email, tgl1_1.name, tgl1_1.password, tgl1_1.phone_number, tgl1_1.username, tgl1_1.education from purchase p1_0 join route r1_0 on r1_0.id=p1_0.route_id join route_guide tgl1_0 on r1_0.id=tgl1_0.route_id join (select * from user t where t.user_type='GUIDE') tgl1_1 on tgl1_1.id=tgl1_0.guide_id join review r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.review_id where r2_0.rating=1 limit ?, ?

testcase.name: getTop3RoutesWithMaxRatingTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.max_number_users, r1_0.name, r1_0.price, r1_0.total_km from purchase p1_0 join route r1_0 on r1_0.id=p1_0.route_id join review r2_0 on r2_0.id=p1_0.review_id group by r1_0.id order by max(r2_0.rating) desc limit 3

testcase.name: getCountOfPurchasesBetweenDatesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select count(p1_0.id) from purchase p1_0 where p1_0.date between ? and ? Hibernate: select count(p1_0.id) from purchase p1_0 where p1_0.date between ? and ? Hibernate: select count(p1_0.id) from purchase p1_0 where p1_0.date between ? and ?
